LAW AND MOTION 301, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF KENNETH JOHNSON'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO AMEND AND FILE SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT IS DENIED; PLAINTIFF'S MOTION DOES NOT COMPLY WITH THE REQUIREMENTS OF CRC 3.1324. MOST FUNDAMENTALLY, IT DOES NOT INCLUDE THE PROPOSED AMENDMENT. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL A. KAREN CSR# 8189 (301/PJB)
